gold.name: Riverbend Open
claims: The Riverbend Open concluded on August 17, 2025, in Davenport, Iowa.
The Riverbend Open drew 312 players across five sections.
The Riverbend Open championship section carried a $6,000 first prize.

gold.name: Marta Ilves
claims: Marta Ilves won the championship section of the Riverbend Open with a score of 8.5 out of 9.
Marta Ilves is a schoolteacher from Tartu.
Marta Ilves has won the Riverbend Open twice before.
